style_guidelines.color_palette: Bold mesh gradients, purple-pink-orange (#7c3aed→#ec4899→#f97316), white or dark text depending on background
style_guidelines.typography: Modern geometric sans-serif, variable font weights, oversized bold headlines (80pt+), comfortable body text (20pt)
style_guidelines.imagery: Abstract fluid shapes, morphing gradients, 3D rendered abstract objects, soft organic forms
style_guidelines.layout: Dynamic asymmetric compositions, overlapping elements with blend modes, text integrated with gradient flows
style_guidelines.effects: Smooth gradient transitions, subtle noise texture (3-5%), soft shadows with color tint matching gradient
